title: A&A FORMAL — Innovations #1912, #1916, #1919, #1920, #1921 (Gap Batch)

title: A&A FORMAL — Innovation #1913: Shepherding Bounty (Standing On-Call Service Position)
canonical_topic: Standing on-call cooperative labor position where specialists maintain availability via monthly Mark activation and are matched to businesses by proximity and reputation with a 100-point override threshold.

Proximity + reputation hybrid ranking with 100-point XP override threshold
Monthly 1 Mark activation fee for Shepherd listing maintenance
Gravity Well auto-slot pipeline converting one cue card into downstream client chain
Per-task Cost+20% compensation with optional recurring subscription arrangement

title: A&A FORMAL — Innovation #1915: Local Wheels (Cooperative Vehicle Provision Model)
canonical_topic: Cooperative vehicle provision model enabling members to earn income while paying down fleet vehicles through an 80/20 Earn-Down split, serving delivery, rideshare, rental, and Crew Call functions from a daily schedule.
composing_primitives: 80/20 Earn-Down cooperative vehicle acquisition (driver income + payoff simultaneously)
Multi-use vehicle daily scheduling (delivery/rideshare/rental/Crew Call rotation)
Automatic title transfer from cooperative to member upon Earn-Down payoff completion
Three-path vehicle onboarding model (Sale, Earn-Down, Lease-In)
Safety Ledger mandatory photo documentation for every Local Wheels trip

title: A&A FORMAL — Innovations #1922-#1926 (Rally Group Transport Bundle)

Vehicle Contribution Onboarding (Sale/Earn-Down/Lease-In with repair-bounty pipeline)

title: A&A FORMAL — Innovations #1927-#1929 (Cooperative Housing)

title: A&A FORMAL — Innovation #1936: Margin Economics as Structural SEC Defense
canonical_topic: The Cost+20% pricing formula simultaneously sets retail prices and generates Marks as non-security transactional byproducts, constituting a structural defeat of the Howey investment-of-money prong through pricing architecture rather than legal exemption.
composing_primitives: Cost+20% as Category 3 transactional byproduct (Green — fails Howey threshold outright)
Constitutional pricing lock preventing governance drift into securities territory
Automatic Mark generation from price differential without labor, investment, or voluntary acquisition
Charter language negating sweat equity and investment characterizations of Marks
Dual-pathway defense architecture (Margin Marks Green + Project Marks Yellow)
founder_voice_quotes: the pricing model IS the legal defense

title: A&A FORMAL — Innovation #1937: ADAPT Score (Adaptive Deployment And Performance Tracking)
canonical_topic: Multi-dimensional cooperative system effectiveness scoring across six weighted dimensions with automated constitutional compliance checking, local SOP adaptation pipeline, helicopter control theory governance model, and cross-cooperative integration framework.
composing_primitives: Six-dimension ADAPT scoring (Effectiveness 30% / Adaptability 20% / Durability 15% / Alignment 15% / Participation 10% / Transmission 10%)
Automated constitutional compliance checking with auto-approve or human escalation
Helicopter control theory governance (cyclic local adjustments / collective platform policy / pedal corrections / throttle resource allocation)
Innovation feedback loop rewarding experimentation velocity over success rate alone
Cross-cooperative tiered integration (Data Mirror / Credit Bridge / Full Mesh) with mutual ADAPT scoring
founder_voice_quotes: The real key to hovering is not reacting too strongly, and keeping changes to the cyclic minute — because there is a LOT of power that is transmitted through that differential transmission to the output, so we need to have info to make adjustments.
